label: ReAct-style reasoning and acting

node.label: ReAct-style reasoning and acting
node.definition: Reasoning traces and environment actions are interleaved so the model can update plans using observations from tools.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, ReAct-style reasoning and acting is modeled as depending on Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Tool use & function calling and feeding downstream nodes such as Observe–plan–act agent loops.
examples: atlas downstream link to Observe–plan–act agent loops
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning, Tool use & function calling.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, ReAct-style reasoning and acting has a `uses` dependency on Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning because Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, ReAct-style reasoning and acting has a `uses` dependency on Tool use & function calling because Tool use & function calling is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
ReAct-style reasoning and acting stores, selects, or obtains information through External databases, APIs & live tools.
